case_title: LEEDS, ROBBIE VS BERKELEY FARMS (OWNER) et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,010.84 FILED BY LEEDS, ROBBIE AS TO DEFENDANT BERKELEY FARMS  (OWNER) GODSOE, DAVID  (DRIVER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEEDS, ROBBIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERKELEY FARMS  (OWNER) $1,010.84 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,030.84 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT. RECEIPT TO BERKELEY FARMS RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-31-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BERKELEY FARMS  (OWNER) GODSOE, DAVID  (DRIVER)
